name: Old-Fashioned Root Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/4 ounce of yeast with 1 cup tepid water and let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Combine the root-beer concentrate with sugar, mix well, and dissolve in 10 quarts of tepid water.
3. Add the yeast mixture to the root beer and stir well.
4. Bottle the root beer immediately and secure the caps tightly.
5. Store the bottle in a warm, draft-free place for 3-4 days until it becomes effervescent.
6. Serve chilled.
Makes about 10 quarts.
